chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision Application No.S- 93 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on o/’objections 2.For orders on MA 6384/24 3.For hearing of main case 14-04-2025 None present for the applicant. **** None present for the applicant; no intimation is received so far; same was the position on last three consecutive dates of hearing, which shows that the applicant and his counsel are not interested in proceeding with this matter. Result thereof, instant Crl. Revision Application along with listed application is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
